official_functions.role: Construct the official Configuration clientbound code_of_conduct packet fixture
Write and read the official Configuration clientbound code_of_conduct body
Encode the packet's codeOfConduct String field
Write the full Configuration clientbound framed code_of_conduct packet
Dispatch and decode the full Configuration clientbound framed code_of_conduct packet
Name the packet id assigned in Configuration clientbound state
Read the decoded code_of_conduct packet String

invariants: The official Configuration clientbound protocol codec writes the packet table id before the code_of_conduct body.
The official ClientboundCodeOfConductPacket.STREAM_CODEC writes one UTF-8 String field named codeOfConduct.
The official Configuration clientbound protocol codec dispatches the framed packet id to ClientboundCodeOfConductPacket.
The decoded official ClientboundCodeOfConductPacket preserves the code_of_conduct packet type, decoded packet class, and codeOfConduct String fixture.
The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded String, and remaining decode byte count are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove UI consent flow, legal acceptance semantics, Configuration completion, registry hydration, Play entry, or runtime behavior.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer UI consent flow, legal acceptance semantics, Configuration-to-Play readiness, registry hydration, Play readiness, or runtime behavior.
